result.summary: Found a major layout issue where the fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid, plus a few minor clipping/truncation problems on the right edge of the page.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar covers the bottom row of game tiles, hiding parts of the content and making those items hard to tap or read.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the scrollable content so it stays above the fixed nav bar, or make the nav non-overlapping.

issues.description: Several horizontal elements on the right side are cut off, including the top category chip row and the rightmost game cards, making the page look slightly clipped.
issues.suggestion: Check the mobile responsive widths and horizontal scroll behavior so partially visible items are either fully accessible or clearly presented as a carousel.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section shows a '0 Games' count even though multiple game tiles are displayed below it, which looks inconsistent.
issues.suggestion: Verify the section count logic or update the label to reflect the actual number of visible items.
